## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the hiring process and requirements for a new VP of Marketing role at the company.](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The ideal candidate should have experience in enterprise demand generation, product marketing, ABM, field marketing, and partner marketing](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [They should be able to manage the existing marketing team and drive strategic initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [The role requires an experienced leader who can bring structure, make decisions, and manage stakeholders effectively](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [The candidate should have startup experience but also know how to market to enterprises and larger customers](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Ideal Candidate Profile

  - [Enterprise marketing experience, potentially from a startup focused more upmarket](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Background in demand generation, product marketing, ABM, field marketing, partner marketing](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Able to manage and lead the existing marketing team day-to-day](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Strategic thinker who can drive initiatives and make decisions amid ambiguity](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Prior experience as a VP of Marketing role, not just a step up from a director level](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

### Current Team Needs

  - [More strategic leadership and stakeholder management](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Clarity on priorities, decision-making, and driving projects forward](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Ability to operate independently without heavy oversight](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Marcel to discuss with Scott this week and get alignment](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Potentially loop in Alexa, Josh and other team members after that](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Flesh out the job description and interview panel](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Adam to share the opportunity with investors once profile is defined](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Start networking and sourcing candidates leveraging internal networks](https://fathom.video/share/jguFd_sz__PHda4DsxYnDcFysEnQR999?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
